title: On a Dark and Bloody Ground
original_title: On a Dark and Bloody Ground
overview: In 1986, Miller's End, Kentucky has become the target of something wicked. Many fall victim to a malevolent presence as a lawman and a mourning father are hell bent on solving the mystery and saving their town.
